summary: Matched several small camera/stage functions in src/melee/gr/stage.c, deleting their assembly from asm/melee/gr/stage.s. The PR introduced C implementations for fixed camera vector/FOV helpers, preserved two still-unmatched functions as inline asm in C, and renamed callsites/prototype comments from anonymous func_80224D94/func_80224DB8 to descriptive camera names.
what_changed: Removed 128 lines of stage assembly covering func_80224CAC, func_80224D94, func_80224DB8, func_80224DC8, and func_80224E38 from asm/melee/gr/stage.s.
Added C implementations in src/melee/gr/stage.c for func_80224CAC, set_vec_to_fixed_cam_pos, and get_cam_fixed_fov.
Moved func_80224DC8 and func_80224E38 into src/melee/gr/stage.c as inline asm blocks with nofralloc, preserving exact assembly where C matching was not yet completed.
Renamed assembly callsites in asm/melee/cm/code_80028B9C.s from func_80224DB8 to get_cam_fixed_fov and from func_80224D94 to set_vec_to_fixed_cam_pos.
Updated include/functions.h prototype comments to use set_vec_to_fixed_cam_pos and get_cam_fixed_fov names instead of func_80224D94 and func_80224DB8.
Added extern declarations in stage.c for lbl_803B84C8 and func_801C2D24, supporting the newly moved stage code.
smart_moves: Converted the simplest accessors first: set_vec_to_fixed_cam_pos copies stage_info.cam_info.fixed_cam_pos into a Vec, and get_cam_fixed_fov returns stage_info.cam_info.fixed_cam_fov.
Used meaningful camera-domain names for matched helper functions, then propagated those names to existing assembly callsites so later decompilation work can infer behavior from call names.
Kept hard-to-match functions as inline asm in stage.c rather than leaving them in the standalone assembly file, shrinking asm/melee/gr/stage.s while preserving exact code generation.

Expressed func_80224CAC in terms of Vec temporaries, stage_info.cam_info fields, degree-to-radian conversion, and func_8000E138 rotation setup, making the fixed-camera calculation easier to understand.
decomp_lessons: For staged progress, moving unmatched routines from .s into C as inline asm can reduce standalone asm surface area without pretending the routines are fully decompiled.
Tiny field accessors are good naming anchors: once a function is proven to return a specific struct field such as fixed_cam_fov, rename it and update all callsites.
Struct field names in stage_info.cam_info enabled readable C for camera helpers: fixed_cam_pos, fixed_cam_vert_angle, fixed_cam_horz_angle, and fixed_cam_fov directly explain the previous offsets.
When matching vector code, whole-struct Vec assignment can replace repeated lwz/stw sequences if the compiler emits equivalent copies.
Temporary Vec locals can mirror stack layout from assembly while still making math intent clearer.

naming_conventions.reason: The matched routine copies stage_info.cam_info.fixed_cam_pos into the output Vec.

naming_conventions.name: func_80224CAC
naming_conventions.note: Left with address-style name despite a C implementation; evidence does not show a reviewed semantic rename.

naming_conventions.name: func_80224DC8
naming_conventions.note: Still address-style and represented as inline asm; behavior not named in this PR.

naming_conventions.name: func_80224E38
naming_conventions.note: Still address-style and represented as inline asm wrapper around func_801C2D24.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted matched routines from asm/melee/gr/stage.s after adding corresponding definitions in src/melee/gr/stage.c.
Used inline asm with nofralloc for func_80224DC8 and func_80224E38 to preserve exact instruction sequences and labels while relocating them into the C translation unit.
Matched fixed camera position copy with `*arg0 = stage_info.cam_info.fixed_cam_pos;`.
Matched fixed FOV accessor with direct return of `stage_info.cam_info.fixed_cam_fov`.

Reconstructed func_80224CAC using `Vec another_vec = lbl_803B84C8`, radian-converted vertical/horizontal fixed camera angles, a call to func_8000E138, and final projection math using `arg0->z / -another_vec.z`.
Updated assembly references in another file to call the newly named C symbols, keeping cross-module references consistent.

review_feedback.text: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename func_80224CAC, func_80224DC8, or func_80224E38.
Search for later struct/header cleanup around StageInfo cam_info and fixed camera fields.
Check whether func_80224DC8 was later converted from inline asm to C and given a semantic name.
Look for later replacement of raw externs lbl_803B84C8 and func_801C2D24 with proper headers.
